prose:
The Fukui reactivity analysis for furan was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier `standard`) with PySCF, in the gas phase, with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1. The geometry was sourced from the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` file.

The Fukui indices for each atom are as follows:

| Atom | Fukui f+ (Electrophilicity) | Fukui f- (Nucleophilicity) | Fukui f0 (Radical Attack) | Dual Descriptor |
|------|-----------------------------|----------------------------|---------------------------|-----------------|
| O    | -1.33162                    | 0.08382                    | -0.62390                  | -1.41544        |
| C    | 1.22869                     | 0.08910                    | 0.65889                   | 1.13958         |
| C    | 1.22703                     | 0.08930                    | 0.65817                   | 1.13772         |
| C    | 1.92331                     | 0.16153                    | 1.04242                   | 1.76178         |
| C    | 1.92429                     | 0.16164                    | 1.04297                   | 1.76266         |
| H    | -1.21906                    | 0.10248                    | -0.55829                  | -1.32155        |
| H    | -1.21911                    | 0.10251                    | -0.55830                  | -1.32162        |
| H    | -0.76678                    | 0.10482                    | -0.33098                  | -0.87160        |
| H    | -0.76674                    | 0.10479                    | -0.33097                  | -0.87153        |

The most electrophilic site is Carbon atom 5 (f+ = 1.92429).
The most nucleophilic site is Carbon atom 5 (f- = 0.16164).

The integrity of the calculation is trustworthy.
The following warnings were reported by the tool:
- sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
- sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
- common header present

The calculation command was: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --accept-defaults --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpvuyvc4pd/live.json`

The output JSON was written to `furan_fukui.json`.
